commands.review_summary:
The PR shows compact totals only on unfiltered Skills, Plugins, and Publishers pages, client-loads the Plugins catalog, adds a denormalized public-plugin total, and revises adjacent publisher filters, navigation, and search count presentation.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature and UX architecture PR rather than a report of broken current-main behavior; the contributor did provide high-confidence demonstrations of the proposed states.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A maintainer must resolve the dirty branch and decide the permanent publisher URL, navigation, search-count, loading, and counter-operation scope before merge; this is not a narrow autonomous repair.

target.title: Show unfiltered browse totals
target.body:
## Summary

- Show compact total counts on `/skills`, `/plugins`, and `/publishers` only when no browse filters or search are active.
- Hide totals for filtered/search states and keep the old loaded-result copy removed.
- Make the Plugins browse shell render immediately, then load catalog data client-side so Skills -> Plugins navigation responds quickly.
- Maintain plugin totals through global stats and hide the plugin count until the first full reconciliation has populated it.

## A/B UI Proof

Playwright compared `https://clawhub.ai` against this PR on localhost at `1440x900`.

Skills localhost was pointed at the live Convex backend so the proof uses the full production skill count. Plugins and Publishers use the local Convex backend because this PR changes their backend count behavior.

![Production vs this PR browse counts](https://gist.githubusercontent.com/jesse-merhi/f221735bed3d2d7f40c5ee4da0fdbc0d/raw/ab-browse-counts.svg)

| Page state | Production | This PR |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `/skills` | title count `70.3k` | title count `70.3K` with live Convex data |
| `/skills?q=agent` | title count still shown: `70.3k` | no title count |
| `/plugins` | title count `100+` | exact title count `251` from local Convex data |
| `/plugins?q=github` | filtered result count shown in title: `9` | no title count |
| `/publishers` | title count `499`; `Showing` copy present | title count `25`; no `Showing` copy |
| `/publishers?q=open` | title count still shown: `499`; `Showing` copy present | no title count; no `Showing` copy |

The important behavior: unfiltered pages show a total, filtered/search pages hide the title count, and the misleading loaded/showing copy is gone.

Raw proof files:

- A/B sheet: https://gist.github.com/jesse-merhi/f221735bed3d2d7f40c5ee4da0fdbc0d
- Corrected local files: `/tmp/clawhub-ab-proof-corrected/ab-browse-counts.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-ab-proof-corrected/metrics.json`
- Skills live-backend proof: `/tmp/clawhub-skills-proof-prod-backend/skills-ab.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-skills-proof-prod-backend/metrics.json`

## Verification

- `bunx convex codegen`
- `bun run test src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/publishers-route.test.tsx src/lib/packageApi.test.ts convex/statsMaintenance.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts convex/lib/packageSearchDigest.test.ts convex/packages.countPublicPlugins.test.ts`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- `bun run ci:types-build`
- `git diff --check`
- `bun /tmp/clawhub-ab-proof-fast.mjs`
- `bun /tmp/clawhub-skills-proof-prod-backend.mjs`
- `bun /tmp/clawhub-ab-proof-corrected.mjs`
- Autoreview: no actionable correctness issues reported; the helper footer still returned a false positive exit after clean review text.

## UI Checks

- Local UI proof used `http://127.0.0.1:3002/` with local Convex data for Plugins and Publishers.
- Skills count proof used `http://127.0.0.1:3004/` with `https://wry-manatee-359.convex.cloud`; `skills:countPublicSkills` returned `70338`.
- Verified filtered Skills, Plugins, and Publishers hide the title count.
- Verified Skills -> Plugins shell rendered in about `252ms` with the loading skeleton visible.
- Checked responsive layouts at `390x844`, `768x1024`, and `1440x900`.
- `npx --yes impeccable detect src/routes/skills/index.tsx src/routes/plugins/index.tsx src/routes/publishers/index.tsx --json` returned `[]`.
- Playwright saw the existing local React hydration warning for theme attributes on `<html>`; production did not log console errors in this pass.
target.author: jesse-merhi
